narrative:
Precinct Monclova 7 (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,013 registered voters, with 46.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.9%, a modest Republican lean of 5.6 percentage points.
